Concurrent Minutes Number CHAR 4 The data in this column indicates the total number of minutes that occupational therapy was administered to the resident concurrently with one other resident in the last seven days. discontinued 09/30/2025
518 O0400B3_OT_GRP_MIN_NUM O0400B3_OT_GRP_MIN_NUM O0400B3 Occupational Therapy Group Minutes Number CHAR 4 The data in this column indicates the total number of minutes that occupational therapy was administered to the resident as part of a group of residents
